alt: A modern home with warm interior light glowing through floor-to-ceiling windows at golden hour, mature landscaping in the foreground.
A quiet tree-lined residential street with a row of brick brownstones, sunlight filtering through the canopy.
Wide-angle exterior of a contemporary two-story home with clean lines, large glass panels, and a manicured front lawn.
An open-concept kitchen with a marble centre island, light wood cabinetry, and abundant natural daylight.
A restrained primary bedroom with neutral linens facing a large window framing a quiet city view.
A wooden deck beside a still swimming pool at dusk, lounge chairs and warm ambient lighting from the house behind.
A warm boutique office interior with wooden desks and tall plants catching afternoon light.
Editorial portrait of an adult woman in soft natural light, calm expression, neutral background.
Editorial portrait of an adult man with glasses, professional, warm natural lighting, looking at camera.
A charming neighborhood cafe exterior with a wooden bench out front and a small chalkboard sign on the sidewalk.
A grassy community park with mature trees and a curving walking path catching late afternoon light.
A modern reception desk with marble and warm wood accents, soft overhead lighting, restrained entry detail.
